prompt_text:
### Demographics: 75-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~3.8 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 58.6 kg; Height 152.2 cm; BMI 25.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.1%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 243mg/dL; 9 months ago 241mg/dL; 6 months ago 200mg/dL; 3 months ago 178mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 57.2kg; 9 months ago 58.3kg; 6 months ago 52.7kg; 3 months ago 52.1kg; current 58.6kg), Height (12 months ago 152.2cm; 9 months ago 152.2cm; 6 months ago 152.2cm; 3 months ago 152.2cm; current 152.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 25.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 134mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 63U/L; 9 months ago 70U/L; 6 months ago 62U/L; 3 months ago 58U/L; current 67U/L), AST (12 months ago 45U/L; 9 months ago 36U/L; 6 months ago 35U/L; 3 months ago 36U/L; current 41U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; current 33mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 322mg/g; 9 months ago 373mg/g; 6 months ago 549mg/g; 3 months ago 582mg/g; current 290mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 102mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 99mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 60mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 117mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 121mg/dL; 3 months ago 120mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.8g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
